g.text: 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, Alberta | File VAL251026
The following table summarizes the miscellaneous revenue projected for the subject property.
The potential gross revenue equals the total rental revenue plus reimbursement and miscellaneous revenue. The
potential gross revenue of the subject is calculated by multiplying the sum of market rent of $14,625/Unit and $19.37
per square foot rent and reimbursements, if any, at $0 which is $0/Unit and -/SF by the net rentable area of 18,117
square feet, which indicates a PGR of $351,000.
